home.bio1: I'm a <developerLink>developer and builder</developerLink>. I work on <productLink>products</productLink> that matter. I've been coding for years and care deeply about craft.
home.bio2: My focus is building things that are fast, accessible, and useful. I'm a <musicLink>music fan</musicLink> and believe good software should be invisible.
home.aiTwin: You can also <chatLink>ask my AI</chatLink> to learn more about my work and thinking.
home.footer: You can <blogLink>read my writing</blogLink> or view my <projectsLink>projects</projectsLink>, or <followLink>follow me online</followLink>. <contactLink>Reach out</contactLink> if you'd like to connect.
